# FinanceStore.History.Element

**Type Alias**

An alias for the type that this asynchronous sequence holds.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias Element = FinanceStore.Changes<Model>
```

## Type Aliases

- **FinanceStore.History.AsyncIterator**: The type of asynchronous iterator that produces elements of this asynchronous sequence.
